---
title: "`r params$report_title`"
subtitle: "`r params$report_subtitle`"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y, %H:%M')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    df_print: paged
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \usepackage{pdflscape}
  - \floatplacement{figure}{H}
params:
  vst_mat: NULL
  metadata: NULL
  de_results: NULL
  contrast_name: NULL
  all_contrasts_summary: NULL
  all_contrasts: NULL
  pathway_results: NULL
  pathway_db: NULL
  sections: NULL
  pca_color_by: NULL
  pca_palette: "default"
  pca_manual_colors: NULL
  role_colors: NULL
  heatmap_top_n: 30
  lfc_thresh: 1
  padj_thresh: 0.05
  multimethod_de: NULL
  multimethod_consensus: NULL
  pairwise_layout: "grid"
  report_title: "Analyse RNA-seq Bulk"
  report_subtitle: ""
  report_notes: ""
  interactive: TRUE
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                     fig.width = 9, fig.height = 6, out.width = "100%",
                     fig.pos = "H")
# fig.pos="H" + \floatplacement{figure}{H} (YAML header-includes) force chaque
# figure a rester exactement ou le code la place en PDF/LaTeX -- corrige le
# bug "heatmap affichee pres du sommaire au lieu de sa position reelle".
sections <- params$sections
`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a)) b else a

# Renders a ggplot as an interactive plotly widget in HTML output (when
# params$interactive is TRUE), or leaves it as a static ggplot otherwise.
# PDF can never embed JS widgets, so it always falls back to static --
# this guard makes the same Rmd source safely produce both formats.
render_plot <- function(p, allow_interactive = TRUE) {
  if (allow_interactive && isTRUE(params$interactive) && knitr::is_html_output() &&
      requireNamespace("plotly", quietly = TRUE)) {
    return(plotly::ggplotly(p))
  }
  p
}

# Step-3.5: helpers pour mise en page paysage en PDF (UpSet + Table consensus)
# -- n'a aucun effet en HTML (is_latex_output() == FALSE).
.tex_landscape_start <- function() if (knitr::is_latex_output()) cat("\n\\begin{landscape}\n")
.tex_landscape_end   <- function() if (knitr::is_latex_output()) cat("\\end{landscape}\n\n")

# Step-3.5: table large mise a l'echelle en PDF (scale_down) pour eviter le
# chevauchement de colonnes signale sur "Table consensus (top 20)".
.kable_wide <- function(df, ...) {
  k <- knitr::kable(df, row.names = FALSE, booktabs = TRUE, ...)
  if (knitr::is_latex_output() && requireNamespace("kableExtra", quietly = TRUE)) {
    k <- kableExtra::kable_styling(k, latex_options = c("scale_down", "hold_position"),
                                   font_size = 8)
  }
  k
}
```

```{r notes_section, eval=nzchar(params$report_notes), results='asis'}
cat("> ", gsub("\n", "\n> ", params$report_notes), "\n\n", sep = "")
```

# Resume

```{r resume_active_contrast, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(params$de_results)) {
  n_sig <- sum(params$de_results$padj < params$padj_thresh &
               abs(params$de_results$log2FoldChange) > params$lfc_thresh, na.rm = TRUE)
  cat(sprintf(
    "Contraste actif affiche en detail ci-dessous : **%s**\n\nEchantillons : %d | Genes testes : %d | Genes significatifs : %d\n",
    params$contrast_name %||% "-", ncol(params$vst_mat), nrow(params$de_results), n_sig
  ))
} else {
  cat("Aucune analyse differentielle disponible au moment de l'export.")
}
```

```{r all_contrasts_section, eval=!is.null(params$all_contrasts_summary) && nrow(params$all_contrasts_summary) > 1, results='asis'}
cat("### Tous les contrastes calcules\n\n")
cat(sprintf("Seuils appliques : |Log2FC| > %s, P-adj < %s.\n\n", params$lfc_thresh, params$padj_thresh))
```
```{r all_contrasts_table, eval=!is.null(params$all_contrasts_summary) && nrow(params$all_contrasts_summary) > 1}
tbl <- params$all_contrasts_summary
tbl$actif <- ifelse(tbl$actif, "-> actif", "")
colnames(tbl) <- c("Contraste", "Genes testes", "Significatifs", "Up", "Down", "")
knitr::kable(tbl, row.names = FALSE,
            caption = "Resume de TOUS les contrastes calcules dans cette session (pas seulement le contraste actif detaille plus bas).")
```

```{r upset_contrasts_check, include=FALSE}
.show_upset <- !is.null(params$all_contrasts) && length(params$all_contrasts) > 1 &&
  requireNamespace("ComplexHeatmap", quietly = TRUE)
```
```{r upset_contrasts_title, eval=.show_upset, results='asis'}
# Step-3.5: mise en page paysage (PDF) pour eviter le chevauchement de
# colonnes/label sur les jeux avec beaucoup de contrastes.
.tex_landscape_start()
cat("### Comparaison des genes significatifs entre contrastes (UpSet)\n\n")
```
```{r upset_contrasts_plot, eval=.show_upset, fig.width=11, fig.height=6.5}
gene_sets <- build_contrast_gene_sets(
  params$all_contrasts,
  lfc_thresh = params$lfc_thresh,
  padj_thresh = params$padj_thresh
)
tryCatch(
  plot_upset_contrasts(gene_sets),
  error = function(e) cat("Diagramme non disponible :", conditionMessage(e))
)
```
```{r upset_landscape_end, eval=.show_upset, results='asis'}
.tex_landscape_end()
```

---

```{r pca_section, eval="pca" %in% sections, results='asis'}
cat("# PCA -- Echantillons\n\n")
```
```{r pca_plot, eval="pca" %in% sections}
render_plot(plot_bulk_pca(params$vst_mat, params$metadata, color_by = params$pca_color_by,
                          palette = params$pca_palette %||% "default",
                          manual_colors = params$pca_manual_colors))
```

---

```{r qc_section, eval="qc" %in% sections, results='asis'}
cat("# QC -- Correlation Inter-Echantillons\n\n")
cat("Detecte les echantillons mal etiquetes ou les outliers avant interpretation du contraste.\n\n")
```
```{r qc_plot, eval="qc" %in% sections}
print(plot_sample_correlation_heatmap(params$vst_mat, params$metadata))
```

---

```{r volcano_section, eval="volcano" %in% sections && !is.null(params$de_results), results='asis'}
cat("# Volcano Plot & MA-Plot\n\n")
```
```{r volcano_plot, eval="volcano" %in% sections && !is.null(params$de_results)}
rc <- params$role_colors %||% c(Up = "#E74C3C", Down = "#2980B9", NS = "#BDC3C7")
render_plot(plot_volcano_bulk(params$de_results, lfc_thresh = params$lfc_thresh, padj_thresh = params$padj_thresh,
                              up_color = rc[["Up"]], down_color = rc[["Down"]], ns_color = rc[["NS"]]))
```
```{r ma_plot, eval="volcano" %in% sections && !is.null(params$de_results)}
# Step-3.5: le MA-plot du contraste ACTIF (celui-ci, hors section pairwise)
# suit desormais aussi le toggle interactif en HTML -- avant il restait
# toujours statique. Reste statique en PDF quel que soit le toggle.
rc <- params$role_colors %||% c(Up = "#E74C3C", Down = "#2980B9", NS = "#BDC3C7")
render_plot(plot_ma_bulk(params$de_results, lfc_thresh = params$lfc_thresh, padj_thresh = params$padj_thresh,
                         sig_color = rc[["Up"]], ns_color = rc[["NS"]]))
```

---

```{r heatmap_section, eval="heatmap" %in% sections && !is.null(params$de_results), results='asis'}
cat("# Heatmap -- Top Genes Differentiels\n\n")
```
```{r heatmap_plot, eval="heatmap" %in% sections && !is.null(params$de_results)}
res <- params$de_results
res <- res[!is.na(res$padj), ]
valid_genes <- intersect(res$gene[order(res$padj)], rownames(params$vst_mat))
genes <- head(valid_genes, params$heatmap_top_n)
if (length(genes) >= 2) {
  plot_heatmap_bulk(params$vst_mat, genes, params$metadata)
} else {
  cat("Pas assez de genes communs pour generer la heatmap.")
}
```

---

```{r pairwise_check, include=FALSE}
.show_pw <- "volcano" %in% sections && !is.null(params$all_contrasts) && length(params$all_contrasts) > 1
.pw_grid <- .show_pw && identical(params$pairwise_layout, "grid")
.pw_full <- .show_pw && identical(params$pairwise_layout, "full")
```
```{r pairwise_title, eval=.show_pw, results='asis'}
cat("# Toutes les paires -- Volcano & MA-Plot\n\n")
cat(sprintf("Petits multiples pour chacun des %d contrastes calcules -- mise en page : **%s**.\n\n",
            length(params$all_contrasts), ifelse(.pw_grid, "grille compacte", "grand format (1 par contraste)")))
```

<!-- ============ MODE GRILLE (petits multiples compiles, statique) ============ -->
```{r pairwise_volcano_grid, eval=.pw_grid, fig.width=11, fig.height=ceiling(length(params$all_contrasts)/3)*3.2}
rc <- params$role_colors %||% c(Up = "#E74C3C", Down = "#2980B9", NS = "#BDC3C7")
if (requireNamespace("patchwork", quietly = TRUE)) {
  plots <- lapply(names(params$all_contrasts), function(nm) {
    plot_volcano_bulk(params$all_contrasts[[nm]], lfc_thresh = params$lfc_thresh, padj_thresh = params$padj_thresh,
                      up_color = rc[["Up"]], down_color = rc[["Down"]], ns_color = rc[["NS"]]) +
      ggplot2::labs(title = nm) + ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9))
  })
  patchwork::wrap_plots(plots, ncol = min(3, length(plots)))
} else cat("Package 'patchwork' manquant -- grille ignoree.")
```
```{r pairwise_ma_grid, eval=.pw_grid, fig.width=11, fig.height=ceiling(length(params$all_contrasts)/3)*3.2}
rc <- params$role_colors %||% c(Up = "#E74C3C", Down = "#2980B9", NS = "#BDC3C7")
if (requireNamespace("patchwork", quietly = TRUE)) {
  plots <- lapply(names(params$all_contrasts), function(nm) {
    plot_ma_bulk(params$all_contrasts[[nm]], lfc_thresh = params$lfc_thresh, padj_thresh = params$padj_thresh,
                sig_color = rc[["Up"]], ns_color = rc[["NS"]]) +
      ggplot2::labs(title = nm) + ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9))
  })
  patchwork::wrap_plots(plots, ncol = min(3, length(plots)))
} else cat("Package 'patchwork' manquant -- grille ignoree.")
```

<!-- ============ MODE GRAND FORMAT (1 plot pleine page/contraste, interactif en HTML) ============ -->
```{r pairwise_full_loop, eval=.pw_full, results='asis', fig.width=9, fig.height=6}
rc <- params$role_colors %||% c(Up = "#E74C3C", Down = "#2980B9", NS = "#BDC3C7")
for (nm in names(params$all_contrasts)) {
  cat(sprintf("\n\n#### %s\n\n", nm))
  res_nm <- params$all_contrasts[[nm]]
  p_v <- plot_volcano_bulk(res_nm, lfc_thresh = params$lfc_thresh, padj_thresh = params$padj_thresh,
                           up_color = rc[["Up"]], down_color = rc[["Down"]], ns_color = rc[["NS"]])
  p_m <- plot_ma_bulk(res_nm, lfc_thresh = params$lfc_thresh, padj_thresh = params$padj_thresh,
                      sig_color = rc[["Up"]], ns_color = rc[["NS"]])
  if (isTRUE(params$interactive) && knitr::is_html_output() && requireNamespace("plotly", quietly = TRUE)) {
    print(htmltools::tagList(plotly::ggplotly(p_v)))
    print(htmltools::tagList(plotly::ggplotly(p_m)))
  } else {
    print(p_v); print(p_m)
  }
}
```

```{r pairwise_hm_check, include=FALSE}
.show_pw_hm <- .show_pw && length(params$all_contrasts) <= 6
```
```{r pairwise_hm_title, eval=.show_pw_hm, results='asis'}
cat("### Heatmap top genes -- par paire\n\n")
```
```{r pairwise_hm_grid, eval=.show_pw_hm, fig.height=4}
for (nm in names(params$all_contrasts)) {
  res_p <- params$all_contrasts[[nm]]; res_p <- res_p[!is.na(res_p$padj), ]
  genes_p <- head(intersect(res_p$gene[order(res_p$padj)], rownames(params$vst_mat)), 15)
  if (length(genes_p) >= 2) {
    cat(sprintf("\n\n**%s**\n\n", nm))
    print(plot_heatmap_bulk(params$vst_mat, genes_p, params$metadata))
  }
}
```
```{r pairwise_hm_note, eval=.show_pw && !.show_pw_hm, results='asis'}
cat(sprintf("Heatmaps par paire non affichees (%d contrastes > 6) -- changez le contraste actif dans l'onglet Heatmap.\n\n",
            length(params$all_contrasts)))
```

---

```{r table_section, eval="table" %in% sections && !is.null(params$de_results), results='asis'}
cat("# Table Complete -- Expression Differentielle\n\n")
```
```{r table_render, eval="table" %in% sections && !is.null(params$de_results) && knitr::is_html_output()}
# NOTE: interactive DT widgets cannot render in PDF -- for PDF output we fall
# back to a plain, paginated-by-page static table further below.
build_de_results_dt(params$de_results)
```
```{r table_render_pdf, eval="table" %in% sections && !is.null(params$de_results) && !knitr::is_html_output()}
res_pdf <- params$de_results
res_pdf <- res_pdf[order(res_pdf$padj), ]
res_pdf_display <- data.frame(
  Gene = res_pdf$gene, BaseMean = round(res_pdf$baseMean, 1),
  Log2FC = round(res_pdf$log2FoldChange, 3),
  PValue = format(res_pdf$pvalue, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3),
  Padj = format(res_pdf$padj, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
)
knitr::kable(head(res_pdf_display, 100), caption = "Top 100 genes (table complete disponible en export CSV depuis l'application)")
```

---

```{r pathway_section, eval="pathway" %in% sections && !is.null(params$pathway_results), results='asis'}
cat("# Pathway Enrichment --", params$pathway_db, "\n\n")
```
```{r pathway_barplot, eval="pathway" %in% sections && !is.null(params$pathway_results)}
plot_pathway_barplot(params$pathway_results, db_label = params$pathway_db, top_n = 15)
```
```{r pathway_table, eval="pathway" %in% sections && !is.null(params$pathway_results) && knitr::is_html_output()}
build_pathway_dt(params$pathway_results)
```
```{r pathway_table_pdf, eval="pathway" %in% sections && !is.null(params$pathway_results) && !knitr::is_html_output()}
cols <- intersect(c("ID", "Description", "p.adjust", "Count", "GeneRatio"), colnames(params$pathway_results))
knitr::kable(head(params$pathway_results[, cols, drop = FALSE], 20))
```

---

```{r mm_check, include=FALSE}
.show_mm <- !is.null(params$multimethod_de) && length(params$multimethod_de) >= 2
```
```{r mm_title, eval=.show_mm, results='asis'}
cat("# Multi-methodes -- DESeq2 / edgeR / limma-voom\n\n")
cat(sprintf("Comparaison du meme contraste avec %d methodes : %s.\n\n",
            length(params$multimethod_de), paste(names(params$multimethod_de), collapse = ", ")))
```
```{r mm_upset, eval=.show_mm && requireNamespace("ComplexHeatmap", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=9, fig.height=6}
mm_sets <- build_contrast_gene_sets(params$multimethod_de, lfc_thresh = params$lfc_thresh, padj_thresh = params$padj_thresh)
tryCatch(plot_upset_contrasts(mm_sets), error = function(e) cat("Diagramme non disponible :", conditionMessage(e)))
```
```{r mm_consensus_title, eval=.show_mm && !is.null(params$multimethod_consensus), results='asis'}
# Step-3.5: paysage en PDF -- corrige le chevauchement de colonnes signale
# sur "Table consensus (top 20 par rang moyen)".
.tex_landscape_start()
cat("### Table consensus (top 20 par rang moyen)\n\n")
```
```{r mm_consensus_table, eval=.show_mm && !is.null(params$multimethod_consensus)}
cons <- params$multimethod_consensus
cons <- cons[order(cons$mean_rank), ]
cons_top <- head(cons, 20)
num_cols <- setdiff(colnames(cons_top), c("gene", "consistent_sign"))
for (cl in num_cols) cons_top[[cl]] <- round(cons_top[[cl]], 4)
.kable_wide(cons_top, caption = "Consensus de rang -- table complete disponible en export CSV depuis l'app.")
```
```{r mm_landscape_end, eval=.show_mm && !is.null(params$multimethod_consensus), results='asis'}
.tex_landscape_end()
```
```{r mm_none, eval=is.null(params$multimethod_de) || length(params$multimethod_de) < 2, results='asis'}
cat("*Aucune comparaison multi-methodes disponible -- cliquez \"Comparer\" avant l'export.*\n\n")
```

---

<small>Rapport genere automatiquement par TranscriptoShiny -- module Bulk RNA-seq.</small>
